summary: Comprehensive testing of BlackieFi 3.0 massive feature implementation. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). All new frontend pages render correctly. All existing features working with no regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Ollama AI service is not running in preview - AI features correctly show 'AI Features Disabled' and ai_available: false
Note: ChromaDB is not running - RAG falls back to MongoDB-based chunk storage as designed
seed_data_creation: Demo user with full financial data seeded on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All BlackieFi 3.0 features tested and working. Backend: MFA endpoints (status, setup), AI settings (get/put with toggle), Notifications (list, unread-count, upcoming), Currency (rates with 34+ currencies, convert, settings), Data export (CSV/JSON/all), RAG (status, documents). Frontend: All 7 new nav items working (AI Assistant, Document Q&A, Notifications, Import/Export, Settings with AI Features/Security MFA/Currency tabs). Existing features (Dashboard, Income, Expenses, Debts, Accounts, Investments, Budget, Calendar, Savings) all working with no regressions.

auth_and_mfa: POST /api/auth/mfa/setup - returns QR code and secret
ai_settings: GET /api/ai/settings - returns ai_enabled: false (default off), ai_available: false (Ollama not running)
currency: GET /api/currency/rates - returns 34+ currencies with exchange rates
GET /api/currency/convert - converts USD to EUR/JPY correctly

new_pages: AI Assistant - shows 'AI Features Disabled' message (expected)
Document Q&A - shows empty state with upload button
Notifications - shows tabs (All, Unread, Upcoming Bills)
Import/Export - shows Export/Import tabs with data type and format selectors
Settings > AI Features - shows toggle, model selector, service status
Settings > Security (MFA) - shows MFA status and setup button
Settings > Currency - shows base currency and converter
existing_pages: Debts - debt management with progress bars
Investments - vehicles and holdings with pie chart
Budget - monthly budget with bar chart
Savings Goals - funds with progress bars

mocked_services.ollama_ai: Not running in preview - AI features gracefully handle this by returning ai_available: false
mocked_services.chromadb: Not running - RAG falls back to MongoDB-based chunk storage
